name: West Penn P&P
description_short: West Penn P&P Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union offering deposit accounts, auto loans, and Visa credit cards to its membership.
description_long: West Penn P&P Federal Credit Union is a federal credit union serving members in the Pennsylvania area, with a physical presence in Beaver, PA. The institution provides traditional credit union services including share accounts, share certificates, auto financing, and credit card products. The credit union maintains membership governance with a Supervisory Committee that conducts annual audits of member accounts, reflecting the cooperative structure typical of federally-chartered credit unions regulated by the NCUA. The organization emphasizes accessibility, offering online account access and customer support via phone (724-774-9237), with dedicated web accessibility features for members with different needs. West Penn P&P FCU competes in the regional credit union market by offering competitive auto lending and consumer credit products. However, recent fee structures and rate increases reflect pressure on the credit card program; effective September 1, 2025, the Visa card rate increased to 14.90% due to rising operational costs. The credit union maintains standard fees for card services including return payment fees ($25-$35), emergency replacement ($25), and various document fees. Members benefit from the not-for-profit structure and member-centric governance model inherent to credit unions, though rates and fees are subject to change. The organization's commitment to member account security is evidenced by regular supervisory audits and member notification protocols for rate and fee changes.
services: Visa credit cards with grace period
Online account access and digital banking
pros: Federal credit union structure provides NCUA insurance protection on deposits
25-day grace period on Visa credit cards with no finance charges if paid in full
Online account access available for convenient remote banking
Dedicated customer support line with accessibility assistance (724-774-9237)
Auto loan products available with competitive credit union lending
Annual supervisory audits protect member accounts and promote transparency
Member-owned cooperative structure returns profits to members rather than shareholders
cons: Visa card rate of 14.90% effective September 2025 is higher than many competitors
Limited service information on website; full product details not readily available
Card replacement fees ($10 standard, $25 emergency) and various transaction fees add up
Regional institution with limited branch/ATM network compared to national credit unions
Recent rate increase signals rising operational costs may be passed to members
best_for: Local Pennsylvania residents seeking member-owned credit union banking with NCUA protection
Borrowers looking for auto financing from a community-based financial institution
Members who value cooperative governance and annual account audits over profit-driven banking
diagnosis: West Penn P&P FCU is best for Pennsylvania residents and members seeking traditional credit union banking with member governance, NCUA protection, and auto financing. The main caveat is that Visa card rates at 14.90% are significantly higher than competitive offerings, and the credit union's limited online information makes it difficult to assess full product availability and pricing across services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
